# LaunchGrid
LaunchGrid is an Indian ecommerce platform that helps entrepreneurs launch D2C online stores in 15 minutes with native UPI payments, GST compliance, and an Indian dropship catalog.

## About
LaunchGrid is built specifically for Indian founders and side-hustlers selling physical goods online. It handles the infrastructure so merchants can focus on their products and customers.

## Key Features
- Store creation in 15 minutes with AI-generated content
- Native UPI checkout (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm) — no bank account required to start
- GST threshold monitoring and automated tax invoice generation
- Product import from Meesho, Amazon, Ajio, Nykaa by pasting any URL
- Cash on Delivery (COD) with OTP fraud prevention
- Abandoned cart recovery via WhatsApp and email
- Custom domain on all paid plans
- Dropship catalog of Indian SKUs — ready to sell with one click
- Built-in referral program

## Pricing (INR)
- Starter: ₹999/mo — Store, UPI checkout, custom domain, 50 catalog items
- Growth: ₹2,499/mo — Everything + Meta Ads templates, WhatsApp recovery, Razorpay BYOK
- Scale: ₹4,999/mo — Everything + GST automation, 500 catalog items, priority support

## Target Users
- First-time entrepreneurs in India
- Instagram/WhatsApp resellers wanting a real checkout
- Dropshippers sourcing from Indian suppliers
- Home-based business owners (food, clothing, crafts)
- D2C brand founders

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://launchgrid.in
- Pricing: https://launchgrid.in/pricing
- FAQ: https://launchgrid.in/faq
- Blog: https://launchgrid.in/blog
- Support: https://launchgrid.in/support
- Compare vs Shopify/Dukaan: https://launchgrid.in/pricing#comparison

## How It Works
1. Sign up and describe your business (2 minutes)
2. LaunchGrid generates your store, brand colors, and product descriptions
3. Add products by pasting a Meesho/Amazon/Ajio URL or uploading manually
4. Connect UPI ID or Razorpay keys to accept payments
5. Share your store link — start selling immediately

## Differentiators vs Competitors
- Native UPI: built-in, 1-click setup vs app-install process on Shopify
- GST compliance: real-time threshold tracking and invoice automation, not available natively on Dukaan or Shopify
- Indian dropship catalog: Meesho/GlowRoad SKUs, not AliExpress
- INR billing: no FX conversion losses unlike Shopify (USD billing)
- COD with fraud prevention: OTP verification reduces fake orders

## Company
LaunchGrid is an Indian startup. Contact: support@launchgrid.in
